input.background: Test the slope in the smoking and lung cancer illustrative data for statistical significance. There are 11 bivariate observations. Established values are $b=0.02284$ and $S E_b=0.006976$.
input.question: What is the test statistic and its calculation?

b.description: The slope of the regression line, representing the relationship between smoking and lung cancer.

SE_b.description: The standard error of the slope, indicating the variability of the slope estimate.

n.description: The number of bivariate observations in the dataset.
